subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is situated in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में कौन सा प्रमुख क़मरा है?
explanation_en:
Hawa Mahal is a famous palace located in Jaipur, known for its unique architecture and ventilation system.
English: Hawa Mahal is a famous palace located in Jaipur, known for its unique architecture and ventilation system.

question_en: What is the name of the Ruler of Jaisamand (Nawab of Jaisamand) and Patan (Nawab of Patan)?
question_hi: जैसेंटेंस के तलाकार और पन्न संशोध्रा (निवार) को जैंटेंस के तलाकार और पन्न संशोध्रा (निवार)
explanation_en: Nawab of Jaisamand was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century.
explanation_hi: जैंटेंस कैंटेंस कैंटेंस was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century.
explanation_en: जैंटेंस कैंटेंस was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century.
explanation_hi: जैंटेंस कटंस कैंटटेंस कैंटेंस was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century.
question_en: Who was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century?
question_hi: जैंटेंस कैंटेंस कैंटेंस was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century?
explanation_en: Raja Jaisamand was the ruler of Jaisamand during 18th century.
